name: Puddle Gloomp (Gloompus lachrymosus)

parts.placement: ventral, unevenly spaced because the artist lost count

parts.shape: droopy tube with a bead on the end
parts.placement: clustered on the upper-left of the body

distinctive_features: three eyestalks that never all look the same way
a forked tail it trips over
faint blue bioluminescent freckles when startled
vibe: a deeply sincere puddle that apologises for existing
